framingZh: 构图跟着这个瞬间走，让同一个瞬间里的动作和现场先成立。
framingEn: moment-led framing rooted in the same lived action
mustShowEn: hand holding a hairpin, fingers touching the cool metal part
drawer corner where the hairpin was found, slightly open
mayShowEn: sleeve edge of the character's arm
hint of the red hairclip in the character's hair
other ordinary items inside the drawer
mustAvoidEn: rewriting the moment into a different event
dramatic lighting that makes the hairpin look like a treasure
empty hand posing without the drawer context
atmosphereZh: 像顺手留下的一段真实生活
altTextZh: 翻找充电线时，在抽屉角落摸到一枚很久没用的发夹，金属部分有点凉。
